candidates.rationale: Small line-field cases have direct closed-form references and are the safest first qualification candidates.
candidates.primary_blocker: no blocker; reviewer approved the retained release evidence against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: none for the current 1D closed-form qualification scope
candidates.graduation_gate: analytic reference, tolerance provenance, and CI artifact must all be present before qualification

candidates.rationale: Classic beam, torsion, and frame cases are central to engineering trust and have textbook references.
candidates.primary_blocker: release evidence is attached; final trust-level promotion still requires reviewer sign-off against the graduation gate
evidence_gaps: reviewer sign-off against the attached release-retained structural validation bundle
required_artifacts: documented force and moment sign convention
candidates.graduation_gate: two independent canonical cases must pass with documented tolerances

candidates.rationale: 2D thermal and thermoelastic patches are needed before material heat-spreader claims can mature.
candidates.primary_blocker: mesh refinement, boundary coverage, and material provenance evidence are present; final trust-level promotion still requires reviewer sign-off
evidence_gaps: reviewer sign-off against the thermal plane evidence bundle
candidates.graduation_gate: mesh and boundary evidence must be linked from the operator reliability entry

candidates.rationale: Plane electromagnetic patches are important for dielectric and magnetic material screening.
candidates.primary_blocker: field-energy, material provenance, and orientation regression evidence are present; final trust-level promotion still requires reviewer sign-off
evidence_gaps: reviewer sign-off against the electromagnetic plane evidence bundle
candidates.graduation_gate: field, flux, and stored-energy checks must pass across at least two orientations

candidates.rationale: Modal workflows need convergence and mode-order evidence before serious vibration claims.
candidates.primary_blocker: mode-shape normalization, ordering, and length-scaling evidence are present; final trust-level promotion still requires reviewer sign-off
evidence_gaps: reviewer sign-off against the modal frame evidence bundle
candidates.graduation_gate: mode frequencies and ordering must remain stable under documented refinement

candidates.rationale: The Stokes operators are intentionally screening-grade; their quad and triangle fixtures now have explicit scope, boundary, and tolerance evidence for review.
candidates.primary_blocker: higher trust remains blocked until convergence or external-reference evidence exists
evidence_gaps: mesh-convergence or external-reference evidence for any claim beyond review-screening
required_artifacts: triangle geometry and heterogeneous material regression
candidates.graduation_gate: do not qualify until the Stokes-only screening scope is backed by convergence or external-reference evidence
